name: Merchant
description: Interstellar traders, ship crew and brokers. The lifeblood of the Imperial economy.

merchant_marine.name: Merchant Marine
merchant_marine.description: You serve as crew on a merchant vessel.

free_trader.name: Free Trader
free_trader.description: You own (or part-own) your own ship and chase cargoes across the stars.

broker.name: Broker
broker.description: You buy and sell cargoes, arranging deals between traders and clients.

mishaps.1: Severely injured (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: Your ship is attacked by pirates, corsairs or competitors. Gain an Enemy; if you survive, you lose all Benefits from this term.
mishaps.3: A cargo deal collapses catastrophically, leaving you in debt. Your Benefit rolls from this term are forfeit and you must muster out.
mishaps.4: You are caught up in a political or legal dispute that costs you your position. Gain a Rival and muster out.
mishaps.5: Your ship is impounded, lost, or destroyed in a misjump. Gain one less Benefit roll this career.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: Your ship is attacked. Roll Gun Combat 8+ or Gunner 8+ to escape; on failure, roll on the Mishap Table (not ejected). Either way, gain an Enemy.
events.4: You spend several years trading on the fringes of Imperial space. Gain one of Streetwise 1, Broker 1, Diplomat 1 or Carouse 1.
events.5: You make a lucrative deal. Gain DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You travel extensively and broaden your horizons. Gain one of Language 1, Pilot (spacecraft) 1, Astrogation 1 or Steward 1.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You strike a long-term cargo agreement with a major client. Gain an Ally and DM+1 to any one Benefit roll, or DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.9: You are pursued by creditors, authorities or pirates. Roll Pilot 8+ or Deception 8+; on success, gain a Contact among the Imperial Starport Authority. On failure, gain an Enemy and roll on the Mishap Table (not ejected).
events.10: You become well-known for your dealings on a particular route. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.11: You are entrusted with a particularly valuable or sensitive cargo. Either gain one level of Diplomat, Broker or Advocate, or DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: You pull off the deal of a lifetime. You are automatically promoted and gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.
